item.title: #PALLASCAT adorable fact about the Pallas cat, also known as the manul, is its unique facial expression. Pallas cats have a flat, round face with high-set eyes, giving them a perpetual "grumpy" or "angry" look. Despite their seemingly grumpy appearance, t
